PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?numRaces WHERE {
  ?season wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q190002 .
  ?season wdt:P1346 wd:Q9671 .
  ?season wdt:P2441 ?numRaces .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?numRaces)
OFFSET 2
LIMIT 1
